summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WordPress to Static deployment tool. Backend APIs work well (95.8% success rate), frontend UI fully functional with proper navigation, forms, and integration.

minor_issues.issue: Password field shows empty string instead of masked password in GET response

design_issues.issue: Dialog overlay occasionally blocks navigation clicks after form submission

passed_tests: All navigation items present and functional
Dashboard shows correct stats (Sources: 1, Destinations: 1, Deployments: 1)
Sources page with info card explaining no credentials needed
Destinations page with info card explaining FTP/SFTP encryption
Destinations CRUD operations with password masking on creation
Deployments page with info card explaining source to destination linking
Deployment CRUD operations requiring both source and destination
Backend API: Root endpoint, stats, sources, destinations, deployment-configs
Backend API: CRUD operations for all entities
Backend API: Crawler start and status endpoints
Backend API: Compare content and files endpoints
Backend API: Proper error handling (404s for invalid IDs)
Password encryption for destinations using AES-256
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix /api/history endpoint returning 500 error and improve password masking consistency in destination GET responses
success_percentage: Backend: 95.8% (23/24 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor modal overlay issue)
